full_text:
Yang Bing (Wenzong) 楊炳 (文宗)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yang Bing (楊炳), styledWenzong (文宗). An official in the Wei court whose family would go on to be prominent in Jin. Yang Bing was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
